Feature Planning Q1 2024: The Q1 feature plan includes 12 committed features across three squads, with a combined estimate of 184 engineering days. The highest-priority feature is the bulk action API, requested by 47 enterprise customers and blocking three pending contract renewals. Secondary priorities include the notification preference center, the export-to-CSV enhancement for custom date ranges, and the mobile app offline mode. Each feature has an assigned DRI (directly responsible individual), a design mockup linked in Figma, acceptance criteria in Linear, and a target launch date. A mid-quarter review is scheduled for February 15 to assess progress and re-prioritize if needed.
